# Offset-carrier regression: basic rectangle at 60°. Same geometry as
# basic-rectangle.txt, flag on.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(200,0)
(200,150)
(0,150)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(200,150), area 30000

set stall-angle=60
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 39
faces: 4 (boundary: 1, interior: 3)
graph: 8 vertices, 10 edges (perimeter: 8, interior: 2)
regions: 1
